クラス BattleEnvironment

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.BattleEnvironment
public class BattleEnvironment extends Object
Teacher-free RL environment backed by CombatSimulator.

    BattleEnvironment(Supplier<CombatSimulator> simulatorFactory, EpisodeConfig config)
    Constructs a single-party environment with default helper components.

    Constructs an environment driven by the supplied episode factory with default helpers.

    Constructs an environment with explicit factory and helper components.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • BattleEnvironment

      public BattleEnvironment(Supplier<CombatSimulator> simulatorFactory, EpisodeConfig config)
      Constructs a single-party environment with default helper components.
      パラメータ:
      simulatorFactory - factory supplying fresh combat simulators
      config - episode configuration

    • BattleEnvironment

      public BattleEnvironment(RLEpisodeFactory episodeFactory)
      Constructs an environment driven by the supplied episode factory with default helpers.
      パラメータ:
      episodeFactory - factory producing per-episode simulator and config

    • BattleEnvironment

      public BattleEnvironment(Supplier<CombatSimulator> simulatorFactory, EpisodeConfig config, ActionSpace actionSpace, ObservationEncoder observationEncoder, PrivilegedStateEncoder privilegedStateEncoder, RewardFunction rewardFunction)
      Constructs a single-party environment with caller-supplied helpers.
      パラメータ:
      simulatorFactory - factory supplying fresh combat simulators
      config - episode configuration
      actionSpace - action space implementation
      observationEncoder - observation encoder
      privilegedStateEncoder - privileged-state encoder
      rewardFunction - reward function

    • BattleEnvironment

      public BattleEnvironment(RLEpisodeFactory episodeFactory, ActionSpace actionSpace, ObservationEncoder observationEncoder, PrivilegedStateEncoder privilegedStateEncoder, RewardFunction rewardFunction)
      Constructs an environment with explicit factory and helper components.
      パラメータ:
      episodeFactory - factory producing per-episode simulator and config
      actionSpace - action space implementation
      observationEncoder - observation encoder
      privilegedStateEncoder - privileged-state encoder
      rewardFunction - reward function

  • メソッドの詳細

    • reset

      public BattleEnvironment.ResetResult reset(boolean generateReport)
      Resets the environment and starts a new episode.
      パラメータ:
      generateReport - when true, enables logging and writes an HTML report on termination
      戻り値:
      reset result containing initial observation, privileged observation, mask and party id

    • reset

      public BattleEnvironment.ResetResult reset(boolean generateReport, int preferredPartyId)
      Resets the environment, optionally requesting a specific party id from the factory.
      パラメータ:
      generateReport - when true, enables logging and writes an HTML report on termination
      preferredPartyId - desired party id, or -1 to let the factory choose
      戻り値:
      reset result containing initial observation, privileged observation, mask and party id

    • step

      public ActionResult step(int actionId)
      Executes one environment step with the chosen action id.
      パラメータ:
      actionId - discrete action id selected by the policy
      戻り値:
      action result with next observation, reward, done flag and bookkeeping

    • getLastSwapTime

      public double getLastSwapTime()
      Returns the BattleEnvironment-tracked last swap time used for action masking.
      戻り値:
      last swap time in seconds

    • saveSnapshot

      public SimulatorSnapshot saveSnapshot()
      Saves a snapshot of the current simulator state for VinePPO branch rollouts.
      戻り値:
      simulator snapshot

    • saveBranchState

      public BattleEnvironment.BranchStateSnapshot saveBranchState()
      Saves RL-side state that is not included in SimulatorSnapshot.
      戻り値:
      RL state snapshot used for VinePPO branch restoration

    • branchRolloutMean

      public double branchRolloutMean(SimulatorSnapshot snap, BattleEnvironment.BranchStateSnapshot branchState, int firstAction, int K, int H, double gamma)
      Runs K independent Monte Carlo rollouts from a snapshot and returns their mean discounted return.

      State is restored from snap before each branch. After the method returns the environment state is undefined; the caller must reset or restore before using it again.

      パラメータ:
      snap - simulator state to branch from
      branchState - RL-side state snapshot captured at branch time
      firstAction - action ID to execute as the first step of each branch (-1 → random)
      K - number of branches
      H - horizon (max steps per branch, including firstAction)
      gamma - discount factor
      戻り値:
      mean discounted return across K branches

    • branchRolloutMultiAction

      public double[] branchRolloutMultiAction(SimulatorSnapshot snap, BattleEnvironment.BranchStateSnapshot branchState, int K, int H, double gamma)
      Evaluates Q_MC(s, a) for every action in the action space starting from the given snapshot. Returns one entry per action (NaN for actions that are invalid at the snapshot state).

      Used by the counterfactual VinePPO advantage estimator: by averaging the per-action Q estimates we obtain a baseline on the same scale as each Q estimate, which removes the truncation bias that would arise from comparing against the full-horizon critic value.

      パラメータ:
      snap - snapshot of the simulator state to branch from
      branchState - RL-side state snapshot captured with the simulator snapshot
      K - number of independent branches per action
      H - horizon steps per branch
      gamma - discount factor
      戻り値:
      double array of length RLAction.SIZE with Q_MC per action

    • restoreBranchState

      public void restoreBranchState(BattleEnvironment.BranchStateSnapshot branchState)
      Restores RL-side state previously captured by saveBranchState.
      パラメータ:
      branchState - branch state snapshot; must not be null
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if branchState is null
